---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for the dashboard UI or repo experience
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem or opportunity

What gap does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature, improvement, or refinement you want to see.

## Scope notes

Please keep suggestions aligned with the repository's purpose as an HVAC/BMS Flutter UI showcase.

## Additional context

Add references, sketches, or examples if useful.
